personal.name: Kishor Kumar Mahato
personal.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Building products that solve real problems

hero.headline: I build software that
hero.subheadline: Senior Full-Stack Developer specializing in Shopify, SaaS, and custom web applications. I turn complex problems into elegant solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate about building products that matter
paragraphs: I'm a passionate web developer with over 10 years of experience building web applications that function. Located in Kathmandu, Nepal, I've worked with startups, agencies, and enterprises across the globe.

As an experienced developer, I believe every system being created should solve the problem that aroused before. I prefer communication as much as possible to make sure what I'm building suits your requirements.
Your satisfaction goes on the top of my priority list. I take pride in writing clean, maintainable code and delivering projects that exceed expectations.

workProcess.title: My Way of Working
workProcess.subtitle: A structured approach to deliver quality

steps.title: Feasibility Study
steps.description: Understanding your requirements, analyzing technical feasibility, and identifying potential challenges.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: Creating a detailed roadmap, defining milestones, and establishing clear communication channels.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Iterative development with regular check-ins, ensuring the solution evolves with your feedback.

steps.title: Testing & QA
steps.description: Rigorous testing to ensure reliability, performance, and security across all scenarios.

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: Smooth deployment with zero downtime, proper documentation, and knowledge transfer.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: Ongoing maintenance, updates, and support to keep your application running smoothly.

items.title: Shopify Inventory Manager
items.description: A powerful Shopify app for managing inventory across multiple locations with real-time sync and analytics.

items.description: Custom analytics platform for tracking user behavior, conversion funnels, and revenue metrics.

items.description: Full-featured e-commerce solution with multi-vendor support, payment integration, and inventory management.

items.description: Centralized platform for managing third-party API integrations with monitoring and error handling.

items.title: Shopify Development
items.description: Custom Shopify apps, theme development, and store optimization for maximum conversions.

items.description: Full-stack development of scalable web applications tailored to your business needs.

items.title: API Integrations
items.description: Seamless integration with third-party services, payment gateways, and enterprise systems.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Speed up your existing applications with caching, code optimization, and infrastructure tuning.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.description: Architecture reviews, code audits, and strategic technical guidance for your projects.

items.title: Long-term Support
items.description: Ongoing maintenance, updates, security patches, and feature development.

testimonials.title: What Clients Say

items.quote: Kishor delivered our Shopify app ahead of schedule and exceeded all expectations. His communication was excellent throughout the project.
items.author: Sarah Chen

items.quote: We've been working with Kishor for over 2 years now. His technical expertise and reliability make him an invaluable partner.
items.author: Michael Roberts

items.quote: The quality of code and attention to detail is remarkable. Kishor truly cares about delivering the best possible solution.
items.author: Emily Watson
